a:r.a:t: Phase 2 + Continuous Naval Assurance pilot scope
A bounded executable slice proves configuration, impact, approved-solver evidence, approval authority and operations feedback
VISUAL PROOF: ONE CLOSED ASSURANCE LOOP
Configuration → affected scenarios → approved solver evidence → human / class approval → operations feedback
AI diagnoses and holds gates; accountable humans retain release authority.
One hull / block · selected loading cases · one approved solver adapter · seeded change and failure cases
Configuration + assurance graph · signed evidence pack · AI proposes / holds · naval architect and class authority release
